result.stdout:
Description:
  A program to extract data for a specific task. Connect to ArmoniK through <endpoint>

Usage:
  ArmoniK.TaskDumper [options]

Options:
  --endpoint <endpoint>      Endpoint for the connection to ArmoniK control plane. [default: http://localhost:5001]
  --taskId <taskId>          TaskId of the task to retrieve [default: none]
  --dataFolder <dataFolder>  The absolute path to the folder for storing binary data required to rerun a task. []
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
